topics.name: 100–200 Level: Programming, Discrete Mathematics, and Computer Organisation
topics.description: COS 101 Introduction to Computing, COS 211 Programming I (C/C++), COS 221 Computer Organisation.

subtopics.name: COS 101 & COS 211: Problem Solving and Structured Programming
objectives: Write, compile, and debug programs in C/C++ implementing basic algorithms and data input/output
Design algorithms using flowcharts and pseudocode for sorting, searching, and recursion

subtopics.name: COS 221: Digital Logic and Computer Architecture
objectives: Explain binary number systems, Boolean algebra, and logic gate design
Describe CPU architecture including ALU, registers, instruction cycle, and memory hierarchy

topics.name: 300 Level: Data Structures, Algorithms, Operating Systems, and Databases
topics.description: COS 301 Data Structures, COS 311 Analysis of Algorithms, COS 321 Operating Systems, COS 331 Database Systems.

subtopics.name: COS 301 & COS 311: Data Structures and Algorithm Analysis
objectives: Implement linked lists, stacks, queues, trees, graphs, and hash tables in a high-level language
Analyse time and space complexity of algorithms using Big-O notation

subtopics.name: COS 321 & COS 331: OS Concepts and Relational Databases
objectives: Explain process scheduling, memory management, and file systems in modern operating systems
Design relational databases, write SQL queries, and apply normalisation up to BCNF

topics.name: 400–500 Level: Software Engineering, AI, Networks, and Final Project
topics.description: COS 401 Software Engineering, COS 411 Artificial Intelligence, COS 421 Computer Networks, COS 499 Project.

subtopics.name: COS 401 & COS 411: Software Development Lifecycle and AI Foundations
objectives: Apply SDLC models (Agile, Waterfall, Scrum) to software project planning and management
Implement search algorithms, knowledge representation, and machine learning basics

subtopics.name: COS 499: FUTO Computer Science Final Year Research Project
objectives: Design and implement a software system or research prototype solving a real-world problem
Write project documentation and defend before FUTO School of Science academic board
